Title: Victorian Greenhouse Window Spring Floral Pattern T-Shirt
Description:
Step back in time with this charming t-shirt featuring a detailed vintage greenhouse window design.

This intricate print captures the romance of Victorian architecture and the vibrancy of springtime florals. It is a perfect piece for anyone who loves cottagecore, vintage aesthetics, or elegant home decor.

  • Stylish Design: The window motif, complete with detailed floral garlands and elegant frames, adds a touch of nostalgic charm to any outfit.
  • Comfort & Fit: Our soft, breathable fabric ensures all-day comfort, making it ideal for casual outings, garden parties, or relaxed weekends.
  • Great Gift Idea: Whether for a flower lover, a history enthusiast, or a friend who appreciates timeless style, this shirt makes a thoughtful and beautiful gift.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors for best results. Tumble dry low or hang to dry.
